session_focus: If the old GUI DAG is redundant, remove it fully and update the contract so the system stops trying to rebuild it.
user_directives: If the old GUI DAG is redundant, remove it fully and update the contract so the system stops trying to rebuild it.
assistant_responses: Removed the DAG panel and drilldown routes, then redefined T02 as legacy DAG retirement so sync no longer reopens it.
training_value: Deleting stale UX must include retiring its task definition, not just hiding the widget.
The legacy DAG panel duplicated queue and execution state while also reactivating a removed requirement inside the canonical graph.
